mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO inventory_stock_log ( id, order_id, sku_id, qty, status, deduct_retry_count, rollback_retry_count, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{skuId}, #{qty}, 'DEDUCT_INIT', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, sku_id, qty, status, deduct_retry_count, rollback_retry_count, create_time, update_time FROM inventory_stock_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='DEDUCT_SUCCESS', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status='DEDUCT_PROCESSING'
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='DEDUCT_PROCESSING', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status IN ('DEDUCT_INIT','DEDUCT_FAIL')
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='ROLLBACK_INIT', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status='DEDUCT_SUCCESS'
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='ROLLBACK_SUCCESS', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status='ROLLBACK_PROCESSING'
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='ROLLBACK_PROCESSING', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status IN ('ROLLBACK_INIT','ROLLBACK_FAIL')
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='DEDUCT_FAIL', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status='DEDUCT_PROCESSING'
UPDATE inventory_stock_log SET status='ROLLBACK_FAIL', update_time=NOW() WHERE order_id=#{orderId} AND sku_id=#{skuId} AND status='ROLLBACK_PROCESSING'
